prompt: Write a blog post about miso — its history in Japanese and Chinese cooking, its fermentation process, probiotic properties, and how to cook with it without killing the beneficial bacteria. Target the keyword 'how to use miso'.

assertions.text: Primary keyword 'how to use miso' appears within the first 200 words
Body contains at least 4 Markdown internal links [text](/path)
Post includes the 'add miso off-heat' technique (don't boil miso)
YAML frontmatter has title, slug, tags, and meta_description
Body does not open with a # H1 heading
Post includes a FAQ section with at least 2 questions
Post does not end with a boilerplate disclaimer paragraph
YAML includes an internal_links_used audit field
